summary: The door gave way from the wall and

mechanics.name_guess: The door gave way from the wall and
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 013 > items > The door gave way from the wall and
mechanics.excerpt: The door gave way from the wall and folded outward the assault machine forcing its way out into the damp Solaris night: heard lumbering crash as Erik con- tinued t0 power his way through the wall surrounding the Skye Tiger estate and then the final ground-shaking fall of 80 tons meeting earth: Between Jaime and myself, we shouldered Stephen'$ weight and carried him through the trail of debris left behind the OmniMech escape_ We saw no security in the twenty meters separating the bay from the nearest point of the wall; now crumbled pile of rubble with the meta foot 0f battlefield titan half buried in The rest of the Omni was stretched full-length over the ground on the other side of the wall; It Iay into and across Miller Street, wisps ofsteam rising where the light rain splashed against the heated autocannon barrel, Shouts of command drift- ed out from the compound as we came Up to the OmniMech'$ head the first sounds of organized response after the past few chaotic minutes Erik was climbing out of the open hatch at the back of the armored neck: was still holding things together and the numbers don't get much more strained but we weren done yet.
